Test Case Title: Verify user can register with valid email and password
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to register page 2. Enter valid email 3. Enter password (min 6 chars) 4. Enter name 5. Click register button
Expected Result: User should be registered successfully and redirected to login or home page

Test Case Title: Verify user cannot register with existing email
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to register page 2. Enter already registered email 3. Enter valid password 4. Enter name 5. Click register button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating email already exists

Test Case Title: Verify user cannot register with invalid email format
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to register page 2. Enter invalid email format (e.g.
Expected Result: test@) 3. Enter valid password 4. Enter name 5. Click register button
Actual Result: Error message should appear indicating invalid email format

Test Case Title: Verify user cannot register with password less than 6 characters
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to register page 2. Enter valid email 3. Enter password with 5 characters 4. Enter name 5. Click register button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating password too short

Test Case Title: Verify user can login with valid credentials
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to login page 2. Enter registered email 3. Enter correct password 4. Click login button
Expected Result: User should be logged in successfully and redirected to home page

Test Case Title: Verify user cannot login with incorrect password
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to login page 2. Enter registered email 3. Enter incorrect password 4. Click login button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating invalid credentials

Test Case Title: Verify user cannot login with unregistered email
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to login page 2. Enter unregistered email 3. Enter any password 4. Click login button
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating user not found

Test Case Title: Verify logout functionality
Test Steps: 1. Click on profile/user menu 2. Click logout button
Expected Result: User should be logged out and redirected to home page

Test Case Title: Verify home page loads correctly
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to home page URL
Expected Result: Home page should load with hero section

Test Case Title: Verify navigation to explore page
Test Steps: 1. Click on Explore link in navigation
Expected Result: User should be redirected to explore page with restaurant list

Test Case Title: Verify restaurant listing displays
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to explore page
Expected Result: List of restaurants should be displayed with images

Test Case Title: Verify cuisine filter works
Test Steps: 1. Select a cuisine type from filter dropdown 2. Observe restaurant list
Expected Result: Only restaurants of selected cuisine should be displayed

Test Case Title: Verify budget filter works
Test Steps: 1. Adjust budget slider 2. Observe restaurant list
Expected Result: Only restaurants within selected budget range should be displayed

Test Case Title: Verify search functionality
Test Steps: 1. Enter restaurant name in search box 2. Click search or press enter
Expected Result: Relevant restaurants matching search query should be displayed

Test Case Title: Verify restaurant details page displays correctly
Test Steps: 1. Click on any restaurant from list 2. Observe details page
Expected Result: Restaurant name

Test Case Title: Verify map link opens Google Maps
Pre-Conditions: User is on restaurant details page
Test Steps: 1. Click on address or map icon
Expected Result: Google Maps should open in new tab with restaurant location

Test Case Title: Verify file upload with valid image
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to upload page 2. Click upload button 3. Select valid image file (JPG/PNG) 4. Click upload
Expected Result: Image should be uploaded successfully and preview displayed

Test Case Title: Verify file upload rejects invalid file type
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to upload page 2. Click upload button 3. Select invalid file type (e.g.
Expected Result: .exe) 4. Click upload
Actual Result: Error message should appear indicating invalid file type

Test Case Title: Verify file upload rejects oversized file
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to upload page 2. Click upload button 3. Select file larger than 10MB 4. Click upload
Expected Result: Error message should appear indicating file too large

Test Case Title: Verify OCR extracts items from bill
Test Steps: 1. Upload bill image 2. Wait for OCR processing
Expected Result: Extracted items should be displayed with dish names and prices

Test Case Title: Verify dish rating with all fields filled
Pre-Conditions: User uploaded bill and OCR completed
Test Steps: 1. Rate taste (1-5) 2. Rate value (1-5) 3. Rate portion (1-5) 4. Click submit
Expected Result: Worth-It score should be calculated and displayed

Test Case Title: Verify dish rating with minimum fields
Pre-Conditions: User uploaded bill and OCR completed
Test Steps: 1. Leave ratings at default 2. Click submit
Expected Result: Worth-It score should be calculated based on default values

Test Case Title: Verify score displays after rating
Test Steps: 1. Submit rating 2. Observe score display
Expected Result: Worth-It score (0-100) should be displayed with label (Excellent/Good/Fair/Poor)

Test Case Title: Verify recommendations display based on budget
Test Steps: 1. Set budget range 2. Observe recommendations
Expected Result: Personalized dish recommendations within budget should be displayed

Test Case Title: Verify recommendations respect dietary preference
Test Steps: 1. Select dietary preference (vegetarian/vegan) 2. Observe recommendations
Expected Result: Only dishes matching dietary preference should be recommended

Test Case Title: Verify profile page displays user info
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to profile page
Expected Result: User name

Test Case Title: Verify bill history displays
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to profile page 2. Scroll to bill history section
Expected Result: List of previously uploaded bills should be displayed

Test Case Title: Verify protected route redirects to login
Test Steps: 1. Try to access /upload directly
Expected Result: User should be redirected to login page

Test Case Title: Verify 404 page for invalid routes
Test Steps: 1. Enter invalid URL in browser
Expected Result: 404 page with 'Page Not Found' message should be displayed

Test Case Title: Verify responsive design on mobile
Test Steps: 1. Open browser developer tools 2. Switch to mobile viewport 3. Navigate through app
Expected Result: UI should adapt to mobile screen without horizontal scroll
